history.reason: proposal refined after architecture audit; spec/design/c4/sequence/data-schema/idef0/grafcet drafted
tasks.md + handoff + test-vectors + errors + observability drafted; 7 sections / 28 concrete tasks ready for execution
admission gate passed; beta/frontend-session-lazyload branch created from main@96dd10f89 and checked out in opencode-beta worktree; Phase 1 starts

Phases 1 (server meta + tweaks), 3 (part tail-window + fold UI) and 4 (scroll-spy + meta-driven page size) merged to main via merge 490783777. Phase 2 (escape hatch UI) intentionally skipped — Phase 3 tail-window already bounds streaming OOM. Real-world browser validation pending; regressions revertable via single merge revert.
merge 490783777 landed on main 2026-04-20; promote verified → living before revise opens G1+G2 scope

G1 bounded SSE reconnect replay + G2 session.messages cursor pagination. Root cause for mobile + PC comms loss identified 2026-04-22: daemon event-loop starved by (a) SSE handshake replaying full 1000-event ring buffer sequentially via await stream.writeSSE, and (b) session.messages full-hydrate on open with no cursor — CMS gateway also drops the already-existing since param. Phase 2 was originally skipped; revise reopens design to add reconnect-side bounded replay + true cursor-based older-history pagination with CMS proxy passthrough. Evidence: ses_24b2d916dffeaKQcN79znevt1b 19:31-19:35 gateway saw 7x POST prompt_async, daemon saw 0x inbound — splice backpressure from event-loop starvation, not network.

R8 (SSE bounded replay) + R9 (messages cursor) tasks drafted (R1.1–R1.6, R2.1–R2.8), test vectors TV-R8-S1..S5 + TV-R9-S1..S6 added, errors + invariants + observability updated. Ready to enter implementing; execution order R1 → R2 → §1..§6 → §7.
